items.change_action: may be accepted if verifiable with both secrets
items.change_condition: During a limited transition window after server secret rotation.
items.new_value: accepted under either of two secrets
items.related_state_or_step: server cookie verification after secret change
items.extracted_evidence: If the server wishes to allow legitimate clients to handshake through the transition (e.g., a client received a cookie with Secret 1 and then sent the second ClientHello after the server has changed to Secret 2), the server can have a limited window during which it accepts both secrets. ... An alternative approach is simply to try verifying with both secrets.
items.comment: wolfSSL 支持单个 DTLS 1.3 HRR cookie secret 并允许应用重新设置或随机生成 secret；但没有内建双 secret 过渡窗口，也没有 cookie 时间戳/有效期策略。
items.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
items.comparison_summary: 要求描述的是 cookie secret 轮换/时间窗口策略。代码用 HMAC 绑定 cookie 数据和 peer 地址并用当前 tls13CookieSecret 验证；API 可替换 secret，但验证路径只检查当前 secret，cookie 数据中也没有 timestamp 字段。因此基础完整性验证满足，双 secret 或时间窗口策略属于应用/外部策略，库内只部分覆盖。
items.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
items.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:14083; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:6620; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:6547; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7145
items.test_check: source_assertions 验证单 secret HMAC cookie 路径；未发现双 secret 或 timestamp 字段。
items.decision_reason: 当前实现支持应用设置/轮换单个 secret 和完整性验证，不提供内建过渡窗口或时间戳过期策略。

items.change_condition: Server changes the secret value frequently.
items.extracted_evidence: The server can defend against this attack by changing the secret value frequently, thus invalidating those cookies.

items.change_action: invalid if generated outside allowed time interval
items.change_condition: Server stores timestamps in the cookie.
items.extracted_evidence: Alternatively, the server can store timestamps in the cookie and reject cookies that were generated outside a certain interval of time.

items.change_condition: client has a cached session ID set by a pre-DTLS 1.3 server
items.extracted_evidence: A client which has a cached session ID set by a pre-DTLS 1.3 server SHOULD set this field to that value.
items.comment: 通用 TLS 1.3 helper 能写入已有 session ID，但 DTLS 1.3 路径关闭 middlebox compat；未找到明确只在 pre-DTLS 1.3 cached session ID 时发送该值的专门策略。
items.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures
items.comparison_summary: RFC 的 cached pre-DTLS 1.3 session ID 是兼容性 SHOULD。wolfSSL 的 GetTls13SessionId 可写已有 sessionIDSz，但 DTLS 1.3 初始化禁用 tls13MiddleBoxCompat，服务端也清空并不回显 session ID；没有看到针对“pre-DTLS 1.3 server cached session ID”的独立分支，因此只可证明通用能力，不能证明条件策略完整。
items.category: behavior exists but strict proof is missing
items.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 5.3, ClientHello Format; Section 5.2.1, Denial-of-Service Countermeasures；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
items.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:4503; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7707; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7676; wolfssl-master/src/tls13.c:7677
items.test_check: source_assertions 验证 DTLS 1.3 服务端清空/不回显 session ID；未发现 pre-DTLS 1.3 cached session ID 专门策略。
items.decision_reason: 通用 helper 可写 session ID，但 DTLS 1.3 特定条件策略证据不足。

items.change_condition: for DTLS over TCP or SCTP
items.new_value: must not exceed the maximum record size of 2^14 bytes
items.extracted_evidence: the upper layer protocol MUST NOT write any record that exceeds the maximum record size of 2^14 bytes.
items.comment: 未看到 wolfSSL 对 DTLS-over-TCP/SCTP 记录写入 2^14 上限的专门路径；本仓库 DTLS 实现以 datagram 为主。
items.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
items.comparison_summary: 该条是 DTLS over TCP/SCTP 的上层写入限制。当前代码中的 DTLS 1.3 record builder 使用 word16 length 和 buffer 检查，但没有发现面向 DTLS-over-TCP/SCTP 的专门实现或 2^14 上层写入断言，因此只能部分满足/不适用到常规 UDP DTLS。
items.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
items.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:111; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1268; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1273; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1537
items.test_check: 当前仓库未构建/未发现 DTLS over TCP/SCTP 专门路径；源码级检查无法证明该传输模式写入限制。
items.decision_reason: 要求限定 DTLS over TCP/SCTP，当前目标代码和构建环境以 UDP datagram DTLS 为主，不能形成可靠运行结论。

items.change_action: must only be used for the last record in a datagram
items.extracted_evidence: Omitting the length field MUST only be used for the last record in a datagram.
items.comment: 解析端在 L bit 清除时把剩余 datagram 作为当前记录，但没有独立证明该无长度格式只出现在 datagram 最后一个记录。
items.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
items.comparison_summary: RFC 明确省略 length 只能用于 datagram 最后一个记录。wolfSSL 解析代码的行为是当 L bit 未设置时直接把 inputSize-idx 作为 recordLength，这等价于消费剩余 datagram；该机制天然使后续记录不可再解析，但没有单独的显式校验/诊断。发送端总是设置 length，不会产生违规无长度中间记录。
items.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
items.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:111; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1268; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1273; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1537
items.test_check: source_assertions 中 unified_header_length_bit_parse 通过：L bit 清除时消费剩余 datagram；发送端始终设置 L bit。
items.decision_reason: 实现不会发送违规中间无长度记录，接收端语义上把无 length 解释为最后记录，但缺少显式错误路径。

items.change_condition: when verifying the explicit record length
items.extracted_evidence: Do you verify that the explicit record length is contained within the datagram in which it is contained?
items.comment: 源码能证明读取 length 字段本身不会越界，但未看到显式 `idx + recordLength <= inputSize` 检查；后续处理依赖 recordLength 和输入缓冲边界。
items.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header
items.comparison_summary: RFC 检查问题要求确认显式 record length 包含在 datagram 内。wolfSSL 确认 length 字段的两个字节在 datagram 内，并设置 *size=recordLength，但 Dtls13ParseUnifiedRecordLayer 本身没有直接检查 idx+recordLength <= inputSize，因此严格证明不足。
items.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 4.1, The DTLS Record Layer; Section 4.2.1, DTLSCiphertext; Section 4.2.2, Record Header；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
items.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:111; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1268; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1273; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1537
items.test_check: source_assertions 中 explicit_length_bound_direct_check 未通过，确认缺少直接边界检查证据；完整运行测试因当前未构建 DTLS 1.3 被阻塞。
items.decision_reason: 代码能读显式 length 并进行最小密文长度检查，但没有直接证明显式 length 被限制在 datagram 内。

items.extracted_evidence: However, in DTLS 1.3 the message_seq is not reset, to allow distinguishing a retransmission from a previously sent post-handshake message from a newly sent post-handshake message.
items.comment: 代码中 post-handshake ACK/KeyUpdate 使用同一 DTLS 1.3 RTX/sequence 结构，但未能证明所有 post-handshake 消息永不重置 message_seq。
items.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 5.5, Handshake Message Format and Reordering
items.comparison_summary: RFC 要求每个 handshake message 有 message_seq：新消息递增，重传复用旧值，接收端按 next_receive_seq 处理、缓存或丢弃。wolfSSL 发送头写 dtls_handshake_number，通用旧 DTLS AddHeaders 会递增；DTLS 1.3 接收端维护 dtls_expected_peer_handshake_number，旧序号被识别为 retransmission 并丢弃/触发重传，未来序号进入 DtlsMsgStore 缓存，in-order ready message 才处理并递增 expected 值。
items.category: behavior exists but strict proof is missing
items.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 5.5, Handshake Message Format and Reordering；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
items.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:202; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:367; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:339; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:827
items.test_check: source_assertions 验证 KeyUpdate/ACK 使用 DTLS 1.3 RTX/sequence 结构，但未能源码证明所有 post-handshake 不重置。
items.decision_reason: 同一序列状态贯穿 DTLS 1.3 路径，但缺少完整 post-handshake 覆盖测试。

items.change_action: validated upper-bound exception / may return fewer than requested
items.new_value: fewer than num_cids CIDs, including no CIDs at all
items.related_state_or_step: Sending NewConnectionId in response to excessive RequestConnectionId
items.extracted_evidence: An endpoint MAY handle requests which it considers excessive by responding with a NewConnectionId message containing fewer than num_cids CIDs, including no CIDs at all.
items.comment: wolfSSL 实现了 RFC 9146/DTLS CID extension 和 DTLS 1.3 unified header CID bit，但未找到 RFC 9147 RequestConnectionId/NewConnectionId handshake 消息、num_cids 或 cid_spare 处理。
items.standard_section: RFC 9147 Section 9.1, New Connection ID; Section 9.2, Request Connection ID
items.comparison_summary: RFC 9147 定义 RequestConnectionId 和 NewConnectionId post-handshake 消息，RequestConnectionId.num_cids 请求对端生成若干 CID，NewConnectionId 以 usage=cid_spare 返回。源码搜索没有发现对应 handshake type、解析/发送函数、num_cids 字段或 cid_spare usage；现有代码只处理连接建立时的 connection_id extension 和固定本地 API 设置 CID。
items.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 9.1, New Connection ID; Section 9.2, Request Connection ID；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
items.code_check: 复核源码证据：wolfssl-master/src/dtls.c:1254; wolfssl-master/src/dtls.c:1344; wolfssl-master/src/dtls.c:1360; wolfssl-master/src/dtls13.c:1163
items.test_check: source_assertions 中 request_new_connection_id_absent 通过：未发现 RequestConnectionId/NewConnectionId/num_cids/cid_spare 实现。
items.decision_reason: 标准要求动态 CID 请求/响应 handshake 消息，源码只有 CID extension/API 和 unified header CID bit，没有对应 post-handshake 消息处理。

items.related_state_or_step: Sending NewConnectionId in response to RequestConnectionId
items.extracted_evidence: Endpoints SHOULD respond to RequestConnectionId by sending a NewConnectionId with usage "cid_spare" containing num_cids CIDs as soon as possible.
items.comment: wolfSSL 实现了 RFC 9146/DTLS CID extension 和 DTLS 1.3 unified header CID bit，但未找到 RFC 9147 RequestConnectionId/NewConnectionId handshake 消息、num_cids 或 cid_spare 处理。

items.standard_check: RFC 9147 Section 9.1, New Connection ID; Section 9.2, Request Connection ID；已按原始 evidence 字段对应的 RFC 9147 规范语义复核。
